name: pinta-codex
description: Security monitoring plugin that forwards Codex hook events to a Pinta trace endpoint

interface.shortDescription: Forward Codex hook events to Pinta
interface.longDescription: Captures Codex hook events, resolves Pinta identity, converts them to OTLP spans, and sends them to a trace endpoint with retry queueing.
defaultPrompt: Review code with Pinta telemetry enabled.
Send Codex tool activity to my Pinta endpoint.
Trace this coding session for security review.
